# Talk Proposal Submission

Thank you for submitting a talk for Bitcoin 2026!

Please fill out the sections below as completely as possible.

---

## Title of Talk

---

## Speaker Name

---

## Talk Description

### What is this talk about?
Describe the main idea.

### What will attendees learn?
Be specific about outcomes.

### Why is this talk valuable?
What makes it interesting or important?

---

## Technical Level

- [ ] Beginner
- [ ] Intermediate
- [ ] Advanced

---

## Duration

- [ ] 30 minutes
- [ ] 45 minutes
- [ ] 60 minutes

---

## Speaker Bio

Short bio (3–5 sentences).

---

## Relevant Links

GitHub, website, slides, previous talks, etc.

---

## Preferred Day/Time (Optional)

If you have scheduling constraints, let us know.
